metadata.reference: B. Song, F. Liu, H. Wang, J. Miao, Y. Chen, P. Kumar, H. Zhang, X. Liu, H. Gu, E. A. Stach, X. Liang, S. Liu, Z. Fakhraai, D. Jariwala. Giant gate-tunability of complex refractive index in semiconducting carbon nanotubes. ACS Photonics 7, 2896-2905 (2020) (See Supporting information)
metadata.comments: Carbon nanotubes. High-pressure carbon monoxide (HiPco) grown semiconducting single wall carbon nanotube (s-SWCNT) film on Si/SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate.
